hero_sub: Upload an image of plastic waste. Our AI classifies the type, maps it to construction uses, and calculates environmental impact—instantly.
step1_desc: Drag & drop or select one or more photos of plastic waste items.
step2_desc: Our model detects if it's plastic and classifies it: PET, HDPE, PVC, LDPE, PP, PS.
step3_desc: Each plastic type is matched to construction applications with mix ratios.
step4_desc: Export a full PDF report with analysis, recommendations, and impact data.
upload_sub: Upload up to 5 images. Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP.
footer_note: AI-powered plastic waste classification & construction reuse mapping.
marketplace_sub: Buy, sell or donate plastic waste
